title: Project Drawdown — Top Climate Solutions by CO₂ Reduction
description: CO₂ reduction potential (gigatons, 2020–2050) for 4 climate solutions from Hawken's Drawdown (2017). Reduced food waste leads with 70.5 GT potential reduction.

L2_specific: ranking of climate solutions by CO2 reduction potential over 30 years
classement des solutions climatiques par potentiel de réduction de CO2
comparative impact of food systems vs energy vs transport on greenhouse gas emissions
L3_detailed: reduced food waste has the highest CO2 reduction potential at 70.5 gigatons from 2020 to 2050
la réduction du gaspillage alimentaire a le plus grand potentiel de réduction de CO2 avec 70.5 gigatonnes
food-related solutions (waste reduction and plant-rich diets) outweigh energy and transport solutions in total CO2 impact
